enum.name: MAV_TYPE
enum.description: MAVLINK component type reported in HEARTBEAT message to identify node properties.

entry.name: MAV_TYPE_GENERIC
entry.description: Generic micro air vehicle framework.

entry.name: MAV_TYPE_GCS
entry.description: Ground Control Station terminal node interface.

entry.name: MAV_TYPE_ONBOARD_CONTROLLER
entry.description: Onboard companion controller running core systems.

enum.name: MAV_AUTOPILOT
enum.description: Micro air vehicle / autopilot classes defining the baseline controller model.

entry.name: MAV_AUTOPILOT_GENERIC
entry.description: Generic autopilot platform architecture.

entry.name: MAV_AUTOPILOT_INVALID
entry.description: No valid autopilot present (reported by GCS, Hand Controllers, or peripheral components).

enum.name: MAV_STATE
enum.description: Current operational system lifecycle status state flags.

entry.name: MAV_STATE_UNINIT
entry.description: Uninitialized system, execution state is unknown.

entry.name: MAV_STATE_STANDBY
entry.description: System is grounded and on standby, ready for activation instructions.

entry.name: MAV_STATE_ACTIVE
entry.description: System is active, interlocks authorized, and traction system engaged.

enum.name: MAV_CMD
enum.description: Strategic command task identification identifiers mapped into standard COMMAND_LONG packets.

entry.name: MAV_CMD_DO_SET_MODE
entry.description: Set system operational main mode and tracking submodes.
entry.param: Main mode selection partition code for UGV.
Hold state optimization selection code for UGV.
Speed profile operation ceiling configuration selection.

entry.name: MAV_CMD_COMPONENT_ARM_DISARM
entry.description: Arms or disarms the vehicle high voltage traction transmission components.
entry.param: Arm execution authorization toggle (0: Disarm, 1: Arm).
Preflight checks override authorization key code (21196: Force bypass).

entry.name: MAV_CMD_DRIVE_MODE
entry.description: Command to change the low level drivetrain control kinematic configuration of the UGV.
entry.param: Target drive mode kinematics selection code alignment.

entry.name: MAV_CMD_LIGHT_CONTROL
entry.description: Command to modify the discrete current state of lighting hardware components on the UGV.
entry.param: Main driving forward headlight activation state switch (0: OFF, 1: ON).
Front navigation fog environment lighting activation state switch (0: OFF, 1: ON).
Rear deceleration warning brake light activation state switch (0: OFF, 1: ON).

entry.name: MAV_CMD_CAMERA_MARKER_CONTROL
entry.description: Commands the UGV computational routing layer to toggle active video feeds and range indicators.
entry.param: Select target active video capture index channel [1-4].
Toggle graphical scale range overlays visibility limits (0: OFF, 1: ON).

enum.name: MAV_RESULT
enum.description: Result codes returning response statuses generated by an executed command transaction sequence.

entry.name: MAV_RESULT_ACCEPTED
entry.description: Command accepted.

entry.name: MAV_RESULT_TEMPORARILY_REJECTED
entry.description: Command temporarily rejected.

entry.name: MAV_RESULT_DENIED
entry.description: Command denied.

entry.name: MAV_RESULT_UNSUPPORTED
entry.description: Command unsupported.

entry.name: MAV_RESULT_FAILED
entry.description: Command failed.

entry.name: MAV_RESULT_IN_PROGRESS
entry.description: Command in progress.

entry.name: MAV_RESULT_CANCELLED
entry.description: Command cancelled.

enum.name: MAV_BOOL
enum.description: Generic binary condition indicator flag system mapping.

entry.name: MAV_BOOL_FALSE
entry.description: False / Disabled.

entry.name: MAV_BOOL_TRUE
entry.description: True / Enabled.

enum.name: PUSH_BUTTONS
enum.description: Bitmap tracking physical interface execution button states on the Hand Controller panel hardware.

entry.name: EXTRA_FEATURE_1_PRESS
entry.description: Discrete status pulse showing transient action click down on peripheral option switch index 1.

entry.name: EXTRA_FEATURE_1_LONG_PRESS
entry.description: Watchdog latch active showing sustained down hold execution on peripheral option switch index 1.

entry.name: EXTRA_FEATURE_2_PRESS
entry.description: Discrete status pulse showing transient action click down on peripheral option switch index 2.

entry.name: EXTRA_FEATURE_2_LONG_PRESS
entry.description: Watchdog latch active showing sustained down hold execution on peripheral option switch index 2.

enum.name: TOGGLE_SWITCH_POS
enum.description: Bitmask properties evaluating real-time positioning maps for physical tristate toggle accessories.

entry.name: FORWARD_DIRECTION
entry.description: Drivetrain orientation vector select switch indicates absolute Forward tracking reference alignment active.

entry.name: REVERSE_DIRECTION
entry.description: Drivetrain orientation vector select switch indicates absolute Reverse tracking reference alignment active.

entry.name: MEDIUM_SPEED
entry.description: Physical speed governor switch latch configuration index matches intermediate ceiling steps scaling profile.

entry.name: HIGH_SPEED
entry.description: Physical speed governor switch latch configuration index matches maximum ceiling steps scaling profile.

enum.name: MAV_MODE_FLAG
enum.description: Core flight stacked operational system framework configuration bitmask parameters.

entry.name: MAV_MODE_FLAG_SAFETY_ARMED
entry.description: Motors are enabled / running / can start.

entry.name: MAV_MODE_FLAG_MANUAL_INPUT_ENABLED
entry.description: Remote control stick inputs are active.

entry.name: MAV_MODE_FLAG_CUSTOM_MODE_ENABLED
entry.description: System-specific custom mode is enabled.

entry.name: MODE_A
entry.description: Mode A, Hand Controller

entry.name: MODE_B
entry.description: Mode B, GCS

entry.name: NONE
entry.description: No active operational submode state constraint profile.

entry.name: HOLD
entry.description: Hold submode, used when UGV is temporarily in halt.

enum.name: UGV_SPEED_MODE
enum.description: UGV dynamic operational velocity limit parameters configuration profiles.

entry.name: LOW
entry.description: Low speed configuration limit active.

entry.name: MEDIUM
entry.description: Medium speed configuration limit active.

entry.name: HIGH
entry.description: High speed configuration limit active.

enum.name: UGV_DRIVE_MODE
enum.description: UGV low-level kinematic propulsion driving architecture algorithms profiles.

entry.name: SPEED
entry.description: Speed mode algorithm loop.

entry.name: TORQUE
entry.description: Torque mode algorithm loop.

entry.name: TORQUE_WITH_SPEED_LIMIT
entry.description: Torque with dynamic speed limit override active.

entry.name: POSITION
entry.description: Closed-loop coordinate trajectory position pathing algorithm active.

enum.name: MODE_CHANGE_REASON
enum.description: Diagnostic tracking flags pointing to the origin cause of a state machine transition event.

entry.name: GCS_COMMAND
entry.description: Submode changed due to active GCS packet execution script command.

entry.name: FAILSAFE
entry.description: Submode changed due to autonomous structural emergency protection trigger.

entry.name: SENSOR_FAULT
entry.description: Submode changed due to unexpected peripheral sensor connectivity drop.

entry.name: COMM_LOSS
entry.description: Submode changed due to safety watchdog monitoring remote data link timeout.

enum.name: UGV_HEALTH_STATE
enum.description: Generic subsystem communication and structural integrity evaluation diagnostic status layers.

entry.name: RESERVED_STATE
entry.description: Reserved baseline checking array lookup mapping location context line parameter indicator.

entry.name: NO_COMMUNICATION_STATE
entry.description: Communication drop detected with specific target line hardware.

entry.name: COMMUNICATING_HEALTHY_STATE
entry.description: Subsystem transmitting cleanly and confirming functional conditions.

entry.name: FAULT_STATE
entry.description: Subsystem transmitting but raising internal diagnostic anomaly flags.

enum.name: UGV_MOTOR_ERROR
enum.description: Bitfield tracking functional faults inside the traction actuator assemblies.

entry.name: UGV_MOTOR_ERROR_OVER_SPEED
entry.description: Motor velocity has exceeded safe mechanical threshold configuration limits.

entry.name: UGV_MOTOR_ERROR_OVERLOAD
entry.description: Actuator shaft is drawing sustained excessive physical mechanical torque profile.

entry.name: UGV_MOTOR_ERROR_PHASE_LOSS
entry.description: Power phase line break detected inside windings driving winding nodes.

entry.name: UGV_MOTOR_ERROR_BRAKE_FAULT
entry.description: Braking lock assembly safety override mechanism failure warning raised.

entry.name: UGV_MOTOR_ERROR_ENCODER_FAULT
entry.description: Rotary positioning feedback stream track generation mismatch data fault.

entry.name: UGV_MOTOR_ERROR_OVER_TEMPERATURE
entry.description: Stator/winding structural thermal limit threshold surpassed.

entry.name: UGV_MOTOR_ERROR_HALL_FAULT
entry.description: Low-level sensor alignment matrix tracking anomalies registered.

entry.name: UGV_MOTOR_ERROR_STALLED
entry.description: Propulsion drive element locked under power without matching encoder steps.

enum.name: UGV_MOTOR_CTRL_ERROR
enum.description: Bitfield flags reporting hardware malfunctions inside Power Controller gate stages.

entry.name: UGV_MOTOR_CTRL_ERROR_DRIVE
entry.description: Gate driver execution logic module system error detected.

entry.name: UGV_MOTOR_CTRL_ERROR_OVER_CURRENT
entry.description: Inverter phase bridge output drawn dangerously beyond ceiling limits.

entry.name: UGV_MOTOR_CTRL_ERROR_OVER_PRESSURE
entry.description: Transient high voltage rail saturation detected over safe levels.

entry.name: UGV_MOTOR_CTRL_ERROR_UNDER_VOLTAGE
entry.description: Logic power rail configuration dropped below safe operational limit windows.

entry.name: UGV_MOTOR_CTRL_ERROR_OVER_TEMPERATURE
entry.description: Power stage array heat sink temperature has breached safety profile margins.

entry.name: UGV_MOTOR_CTRL_ERROR_CAN_COMM
entry.description: Onboard internal network transceiver timeout dropped during operations.

enum.name: UGV_CAMERA_STREAM
enum.description: Indexing identifiers for routing active high-bandwidth onboard camera video streams.

entry.name: UGV_CAMERA_RESERVED
entry.description: Reserved interface mapping channel designation profile.

entry.name: UGV_CAMERA_STREAM_1
entry.description: Onboard Video Stream Processing Pipeline Channel Module Index 1.

entry.name: UGV_CAMERA_STREAM_2
entry.description: Onboard Video Stream Processing Pipeline Channel Module Index 2.

entry.name: UGV_CAMERA_STREAM_3
entry.description: Onboard Video Stream Processing Pipeline Channel Module Index 3.

entry.name: UGV_CAMERA_STREAM_4
entry.description: Onboard Video Stream Processing Pipeline Channel Module Index 4.

enum.name: GPS_FIX_TYPE
enum.description: Type of GNSS coordinate positioning fix quality solution tracking layers.

entry.name: GPS_FIX_TYPE_NO_GPS
entry.description: No active hardware interface tracking validation reference lines found.

entry.name: GPS_FIX_TYPE_NO_FIX
entry.description: Satellites found in tracking view but tracking baseline cannot achieve positional calculations.

entry.name: GPS_FIX_TYPE_3D_FIX
entry.description: Standard coordinates matrix solution achieved mapping lat, lon, alt data blocks cleanly.

entry.name: GPS_FIX_TYPE_2D_FIX
entry.description: Planar coordinates matrix solution missing baseline altitude tracking verification lines.

entry.name: GPS_FIX_TYPE_DGPS
entry.description: Differential GPS ground link algorithmic correction tracking reference active.

entry.name: GPS_FIX_TYPE_RTK_FLOAT
entry.description: Real-Time Kinematic relative positioning solution tracking data with floating ambiguity phase.

entry.name: GPS_FIX_TYPE_RTK_FIXED
entry.description: Real-Time Kinematic absolute positioning fix layer verified with high validation phase lock.

message.name: HEARTBEAT
message.description: The heartbeat message shows that a system or component is present and responding.

field.name: type
field.description: Vehicle or component type identifier map.

field.name: autopilot
field.description: Autopilot model framework selector index classification code.

field.name: base_mode
field.description: System core operational mode bitmask allocation matrix flag field.

field.name: custom_mode
field.description: Custom autopilot specific flags mapping space; unused zero filler mapping.

field.name: system_status
field.description: Current operational node condition ranking tracking value flag.

field.name: mavlink_version
field.description: MAVLink version tracker.

message.name: SYSTEM_TIME
message.description: The system time is the clock runtime signature reference data layer emitted directly by the master computing module nodes.

field.name: time_unix_usec
field.description: Absolute Gregorian calendar time tracking index in microseconds since Jan 1, 1970 UTC.

field.name: time_boot_ms
field.description: Monotonic local clock tracking time index runtime since hardware system powered on.

message.name: GPS_RAW_INT
message.description: Transmits unfiltered raw geographic coordinates across standard telemetry streams.

field.name: time_usec
field.description: Timestamp capture frame microsecond time tracking marker log entry field.

field.name: lat
field.description: Latitude (WGS84), expressed in degrees multiplied by 1E7 scaling vector factors.

field.name: lon
field.description: Longitude (WGS84), expressed in degrees multiplied by 1E7 scaling vector factors.

field.name: alt
field.description: Absolute ellipsoidal altitude height above Mean Sea Level expressed directly in millimeters.

field.name: eph
field.description: Accuracy measurement index tracking horizontal geometric dilution matrix scaling factor * 100.

field.name: epv
field.description: Accuracy measurement index tracking vertical geometric dilution matrix scaling factor * 100 [Not Used].

field.name: vel
field.description: Ground speed track calculated by filtering array outputs over earth surface frame tracking points.

field.name: cog
field.description: Course heading bearing relative to geometric True North expressed in centidegrees data fields.

field.name: fix_type
field.description: GNSS solution classification fix level quality status indicator value code field.

field.name: satellites_visible
field.description: Discrete quantity profile compiling total space vehicle components captured inside tracker parsing registers channels loops strings.

message.name: MANUAL_CONTROL
message.description: Manual piloting stick control values packet handling translated joystick axes positions profiles vectors indicators metrics layout maps.

field.name: target
field.description: Destination system routing target validation sorting index address code pointer reference profile data parameter.

field.name: x
field.description: Translation axis forward movement reference tracking values range configuration parameter data layout mapping profiles (scaled bounds).

field.name: y
field.description: Lateral cross translation control axis axis movement coordinate mapping parameter validation value tracking data registry profiles (scaled bounds).

field.name: z
field.description: Vertical elevation calculation control axis variables override parameter map configuration data registry filler placeholder context entry.

field.name: r
field.description: Rotational yaw kinematics configuration scale context mapping profile parameters registration placeholder.

field.name: push_buttons
field.description: Tristate dashboard option button switches matrix status validation configuration profile allocation registry bitmap fields tracker logs.

field.name: enabled_extensions
field.description: Data flags indicating active extension blocks inside data structures tracking matrix string loops.

field.name: s
field.description: Extension field tracking auxiliary pitch control steering metrics translation parameter reference index profile data string map loop indicators.

field.name: t
field.description: Extension field tracking auxiliary roll control steering metrics translation parameter reference index profile data string map loop indicators.

field.name: aux1
field.description: Continuous input controller data interface channel sequence metric registration tracking field 1.

field.name: aux2
field.description: Continuous input controller data interface channel sequence metric registration tracking field 2.

field.name: aux3
field.description: Continuous input controller data interface channel sequence metric registration tracking field 3.

field.name: aux4
field.description: Continuous input controller data interface channel sequence metric registration tracking field 4.

field.name: aux5
field.description: Continuous input controller data interface channel sequence metric registration tracking field 5.

field.name: aux6
field.description: Continuous input controller data interface channel sequence metric registration tracking field 6.

message.name: COMMAND_LONG
message.description: Send a command with up to seven parameters to the MAV platform to coordinate core runtime states.

field.name: target_system
field.description: System ID index tracking target platform target hardware components routing path loops.

field.name: target_component
field.description: Component ID index tracking target subsystem execution channel lines validation nodes.

field.name: command
field.description: The strategic transaction action selection verification control task mapping locator indexing selector code standard field.

field.name: confirmation
field.description: Retransmission looping sequence parameter verification tracking check threshold counter variables field.

field.name: param1
field.description: Parameter context data entry index field matching current action selection framework requirements 1.

field.name: param2
field.description: Parameter context data entry index field matching current action selection framework requirements 2.

field.name: param3
field.description: Parameter context data entry index field matching current action selection framework requirements 3.

field.name: param4
field.description: Parameter context data entry index field matching current action selection framework requirements 4.

field.name: param5
field.description: Parameter context data entry index field matching current action selection framework requirements 5.

field.name: param6
field.description: Parameter context data entry index field matching current action selection framework requirements 6.

field.name: param7
field.description: Parameter context data entry index field matching current action selection framework requirements 7.

message.name: COMMAND_ACK
message.description: Report status of a command execution back to transaction initiator point tracking matrices loop.

field.name: command
field.description: Echo validation container returning command Long targeted type structural reference code block.

field.name: result
field.description: The execution outcome status evaluation matrix rating code output profile assignment metrics condition checking tracking flag field.

field.name: progress
field.description: Percentage value tracking execution track completion steps before final acceptance index flag.

field.name: result_param2
field.description: Extended verification parameters feedback data return tracking additional diagnostics state logs.

field.name: target_system
field.description: Destination system verification verification routing address identification index validation code trace.

field.name: target_component
field.description: Destination component verification verification routing address identification index validation code trace.

message.name: RADIO_STATUS
message.description: Status generated by radio and injected into MAVLink stream for link quality evaluations.

field.name: rssi
field.description: Local tracking metric evaluating absolute incoming signal field envelope density scale index values.

field.name: remrssi
field.description: Remote tracking metric evaluating absolute incoming signal field envelope density scale index values.

field.name: txbuf
field.description: Available transmitter ring buffer storage capacity remaining threshold levels parameter value indicators.

field.name: noise
field.description: Local background ambient radio frequency spectrum power baseline interference register value matrix.

field.name: remnoise
field.description: Remote link background ambient radio frequency spectrum power baseline interference register value matrix.

field.name: rxerrors
field.description: Running drop tracking parameter counter compiling corrupted packet frames filtered since powerup boot sequence.

field.name: fixed
field.description: Running drop tracking parameter counter compiling forward error correction data modifications sequence updates loops.

message.name: TIMESYNC
message.description: Time synchronization message used for latency updates and clock alignment sequences across link nodes.

field.name: tc1
field.description: Target system synchronization capture logging timer reference marker coordinate values register field profile.

field.name: ts1
field.description: Source system synchronization capture logging timer reference marker coordinate values register field profile.

field.name: target_system
field.description: Target platform verification routing validation point sequence address location selector indices mapping profile.

field.name: target_component
field.description: Target subsystem verification routing validation point sequence address location selector indices mapping profile.

message.name: UGV_SYSTEM_INFO
message.description: Reports comprehensive subsystem communication status, operating modes, and drive assembly diagnostic matrices of the vehicle platform.

field.name: rear_mc_voltage
field.description: Rear motor controller bridge power input level monitoring tracking loop index configuration values [0.1 V scale].

field.name: front_mc_voltage
field.description: Front motor controller bridge power input level monitoring tracking loop index configuration values [0.1 V scale].

field.name: ts1_hour
field.description: Chronological log capture entry field sequence: Hour (COMP_SUBSYSTEM_STATE).

field.name: ts1_minute
field.description: Chronological log capture entry field sequence: Minute (COMP_SUBSYSTEM_STATE).

field.name: ts1_second
field.description: Chronological log capture entry field sequence: Second (COMP_SUBSYSTEM_STATE).

field.name: subsystem_health_1
field.description: Bit 0-1: Left MC, Bit 2-3: Right MC, Bit 4-5: HV Battery, Bit 6-7: LV Battery Health tracking matrix codes.

field.name: subsystem_health_2
field.description: Bit 0-1: LV PDU, Bit 2-3: DC-DC 48V/12V, Bit 4-5: DC-DC 12V/5V, Bit 6-7: VCU Subsystem health code tracking indices.

field.name: subsystem_health_3
field.description: Bit 0-1: Front Left Motor, Bit 2-3: Rear Left Motor, Bit 4-5: Front Right Motor, Bit 6-7: Rear Right Motor health status mask codes.

field.name: subsystem_health_4
field.description: Bit 0-1: UHF Radio, Bit 2-3: LBAND Radio, Bit 4-5: Companion Compute, Bit 6-7: Reserved tracking parameters.

field.name: ts2_hour
field.description: Power grid data structure state verification entry: Hour (VCU_POWER_SOC).

field.name: ts2_minute
field.description: Power grid data structure state verification entry: Minute (VCU_POWER_SOC).

field.name: ts2_second
field.description: Power grid data structure state verification entry: Second (VCU_POWER_SOC).

field.name: battery_soc
field.description: Main high-voltage traction storage element balance capability index percentage tracker layout.

field.name: lv_battery_voltage
field.description: Secondary low-voltage electronics supply battery rail pressure measurement tracking index [0.1 V scale].

field.name: main_mode
field.description: Active primary command link distribution interface classification routing select track values registry.

field.name: sub_mode
field.description: Active auxiliary automatic movement constraint interlock algorithm deployment status flag values.

field.name: speed_mode
field.description: Active velocity boundary limits ceiling profile setting reference identifier validation mappings.

field.name: drive_mode
field.description: Active propulsion kinematics drivetrain coordinate translation control loops tracking setting profile layout.

field.name: arm_mode
field.description: Active execution status tracking safety mechanism high voltage transmission authorization interlock state flag values.

field.name: intended_main_mode
field.description: Target parameters lookup command verification mirror showing the last primary mode instruction trace code.

field.name: intended_sub_mode
field.description: Target parameters lookup command verification mirror showing the last auxiliary halt instruction trace code.

field.name: intended_speed_mode
field.description: Target parameters lookup command verification mirror showing the last velocity limit instruction trace code.

field.name: intended_drive_mode
field.description: Target parameters lookup command verification mirror showing the last drivetrain translation control track loop choice.

field.name: intended_arm_mode
field.description: Target parameters lookup command verification mirror showing the last interlock engagement verification tracking loop choice.

field.name: mode_change_reason
field.description: State machine routing diagnostic tracking flag pointing to origin factor forcing mode transition updates loop.

field.name: ts3_hour
field.description: Propulsion diagnostic parameters capture update: Hour (VCU_DRIVE_HEALTH).

field.name: ts3_minute
field.description: Propulsion diagnostic parameters capture update: Minute (VCU_DRIVE_HEALTH).

field.name: ts3_second
field.description: Propulsion diagnostic parameters capture update: Second (VCU_DRIVE_HEALTH).

field.name: rear_left_motor_faults
field.description: Bitfield tracking functional operational anomalies localized across Rear Left traction assembly units.

field.name: rear_right_motor_faults
field.description: Bitfield tracking functional operational anomalies localized across Rear Right traction assembly units.

field.name: front_left_motor_faults
field.description: Bitfield tracking functional operational anomalies localized across Front Left traction assembly units.

field.name: front_right_motor_faults
field.description: Bitfield tracking functional operational anomalies localized across Front Right traction assembly units.

field.name: rear_mc_faults
field.description: Bitfield mapping component structural inverter stage malfunctions inside Rear Power Stage housing.

field.name: front_mc_faults
field.description: Bitfield mapping component structural inverter stage malfunctions inside Front Power Stage housing.

field.name: rear_mc_temperature
field.description: Thermal stage heatsink scale index inside Rear Unit.

field.name: front_mc_temperature
field.description: Thermal stage heatsink scale index inside Front Unit.

field.name: light_status
field.description: Bit 0: Driving Head, Bit 1: Front Fog, Bit 2: Rear Brake current operational illumination map bitmap.

field.name: pdu_channel_status
field.description: Bitmask mapping showing high/low line state distributions across discrete channel breaker modules [Channels 1-8].

message.name: UGV_COMPONENT_VERSION
message.description: Describes the current software version along with checksum of the particular component of UGV system.

field.name: software_version
field.description: Software version packaged using SEMVER format; zero default filler field configuration parameter setup mapping.

field.name: checksum
field.description: SHA-256 validation identifier hash compiling full software assembly generation profile outputs.

field.name: target_system
field.description: Target routing validation address locator identity index selection point reference location profile map.

field.name: target_component
field.description: Target routing validation address locator identity index selection point reference location profile map.

message.name: UGV_SUBSYSTEM_VERSION
message.description: Describes the current software version along with checksum of whole UGV system modules.

field.name: component1_sw
field.description: Software packaging build tracking metadata layer assigned to discrete core system module index 1.

field.name: component1_checksum
field.description: SHA-256 build verification check validation identifier mapping sequence for core module index 1 payload assets.

field.name: component2_sw
field.description: Software packaging build tracking metadata layer assigned to discrete core system module index 2.

field.name: component2_checksum
field.description: SHA-256 build verification check validation identifier mapping sequence for core module index 2 payload assets.

field.name: component3_sw
field.description: Software packaging build tracking metadata layer assigned to discrete core system module index 3.

field.name: component3_checksum
field.description: SHA-256 build verification check validation identifier mapping sequence for core module index 3 payload assets.

field.name: component4_sw
field.description: Software packaging build tracking metadata layer assigned to discrete core system module index 4.

field.name: component4_checksum
field.description: SHA-256 build verification check validation identifier mapping sequence for core module index 4 payload assets.

field.name: component5_sw
field.description: Software packaging build tracking metadata layer assigned to discrete core system module index 5.

field.name: component5_checksum
field.description: SHA-256 build verification check validation identifier mapping sequence for core module index 5 payload assets.

field.name: type
field.description: Classification index identifying current application framework variant deployment parameters map setup choices.
